title: Armeria adsurgens
taxonomy: Armeria adsurgens is classified within the family Plumbaginaceae and is a member of the genus Armeria. This species belongs to the order Plumbaginales and is native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. The classification of Armeria adsurgens is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Plumbaginales, family Plumbaginaceae, genus Armeria, and species A. adsurgens. Armeria adsurgens is a type of plant that is closely related to other species within the genus Armeria. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
